<h1>Source code for booktx.record_refs</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Helpers for canonical record and version references.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">re</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">dataclasses</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">dataclass</span>

<span class="n">__all__</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;RecordRef&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;VersionRef&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;canonical_record_id&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;format_version_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;parse_record_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;parse_version_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;resolve_record_range&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">]</span>

<span class="n">_RECORD_REF_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;^(?P&lt;chunk&gt;\d+)(?P&lt;sep&gt;[@-])(?P&lt;part&gt;\d+)$&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">_VERSION_REF_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;^(?P&lt;version&gt;[1-9]\d*)\.(?P&lt;subversion&gt;[1-9]\d*)$&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="canonical_record_id">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.record_refs.canonical_record_id">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">canonical_record_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">part_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the canonical padded record id for integer ids.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">part_id</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;record references must use positive integer ids&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">04d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">-</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">part_id</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">06d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="format_version_ref">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.record_refs.format_version_ref">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">format_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the canonical dotted version reference.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">version</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">subversion</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;version references must use positive integer ids&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="RecordRef">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.record_refs.RecordRef">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">frozen</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">order</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">RecordRef</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Parsed record reference with stable canonical rendering.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">part_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">__post_init__</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">canonical_record_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">part_id</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nd">@property</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">canonical_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">canonical_record_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">part_id</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nd">@property</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">compact_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">@</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">part_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="fm">__str__</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">canonical_id</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="VersionRef">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.record_refs.VersionRef">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">frozen</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">order</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">VersionRef</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Parsed dotted version reference with numeric ordering.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">__post_init__</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">format_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nd">@property</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">format_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="fm">__str__</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="parse_record_ref">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.record_refs.parse_record_ref">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">parse_record_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">RecordRef</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Parse a record reference into canonical integer parts.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">match</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_RECORD_REF_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fullmatch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid record reference: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">RecordRef</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk&quot;</span><span class="p">)),</span>
        <span class="n">part_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;part&quot;</span><span class="p">)),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="parse_version_ref">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.record_refs.parse_version_ref">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">parse_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">VersionRef</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Parse and validate a dotted version reference.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">match</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_VERSION_REF_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fullmatch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">match</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid version reference: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">VersionRef</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;version&quot;</span><span class="p">)),</span>
        <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">match</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;subversion&quot;</span><span class="p">)),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="resolve_record_range">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.record_refs.resolve_record_range">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">resolve_record_range</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">ordered_record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolve one record range selector against source reading order.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;..&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">start_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;..&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">start_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_record_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start_text</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">canonical_id</span>
        <span class="n">end_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_record_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">end_text</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">canonical_id</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ordered_record_ids</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">end_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ordered_record_ids</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">end_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;unknown record in range: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">start_index</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">end_index</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;range start must not come after range end: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ordered_record_ids</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start_index</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">end_index</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;+&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">start_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">count_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;+&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">start_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_record_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start_text</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">canonical_id</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">start_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ordered_record_ids</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;unknown record in range: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">count</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">count_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid record count in range: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">count</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;range count must be positive: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ordered_record_ids</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start_index</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">start_index</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">count</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk:&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;:&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">])</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">04d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">record_id</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ordered_record_ids</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">-&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;chapter:&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter_record_ids</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;chapter ranges require chapter context&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;:&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">])</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">04d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_record_ids</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[]))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">parse_record_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">canonical_id</span><span class="p">]</span></div>

</pre></div>
